title: The stored data contains spaces in front of it and when used as a query condition, an error message "index out of range" is displayed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a(pno String NOT NULL, b String);
CREATE TABLE b(kno String NOT NULL, b String);
SELECT a.pno, b.kno, a.b, b.b FROM a JOIN b ON trim(a.pno) = trim(b.kno);
key_bug_features: Stored data with leading spaces causes index out of range errors.
